name: @gana-v8/ingestion-worker
description: Runs connectors, landing jobs, and normalization checkpoints.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/canonical-pipeline build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/config-runtime build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/observability build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/orchestration-sdk build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/source-connectors build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/storage-adapters build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/canonical-pipeline build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/config-runtime build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/observability build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/orchestration-sdk build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/source-connectors build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/storage-adapters build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
